description_long: This is a sleek, red convertible sports car with a low, aerodynamic profile and a prominent rear wing spoiler. The car features two bucket seats, a detailed dashboard, and a streamlined hood with angular headlights. Its body is sculpted with aggressive lines and side air intakes, emphasizing speed and performance. The wheels are large, silver, and multi-spoked, designed for both aesthetics and high-speed stability. The rear of the car includes dual exhausts and a wide stance, enhancing its sporty appearance. The open-top design and visible interior details suggest a focus on both luxury and driving experience.
description: A red convertible sports car with a rear wing spoiler, two seats, and multi-spoke silver wheels. Its aerodynamic body and open-top design highlight speed and luxury.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the wide stance, dual exhausts, rear wing spoiler, and open cockpit with visible seats and dashboard.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the car's low profile, sculpted side panels, large silver wheels, and open-top interior.
description_view_2: Front view highlighting the angular headlights, streamlined hood, and two bucket seats in the open cockpit.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the aerodynamic lines, large wheels, and rear spoiler.
